messages.content: You are a support agent for the Workspace tool suite. Complete the request by calling the available tools with exactly the argument values the request specifies. When done, reply with a short confirmation.
Search the docs for 'refund policy'.

doc-1.title: Refund policy
doc-1.body: Refunds are processed within 5 business days.
